name: social-sciences-in-china-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《中国社会科学》, the cross-disciplinary social-science flagship of the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences.

plugins.name: social-sciences-in-china-skills
plugins.description: Eleven-skill bundle covering the 《中国社会科学》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning, problematic framing, original-theory contribution, theory-tradition literature dialogue, argumentation rigor, evidence handling, scholarly style, abstract + keywords, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
